# terrible_cisco_mso_mso_schema_template_anp_epg (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `anp` (String) The name of the ANP.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `schema` (String) The name of the schema.
- `template` (String) The name of the template.

### Optional

- `access_type` (String) This parameter indicates how the service will be accessed. It is only available when epg_type is service.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `bd` (String) The BD associated to this ANP.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `deployment_type` (String) The deployment_type parameter indicates how and where the service is deployed. This parameter is available only when epg_type is service.
- `description` (String) The description as displayed on the MSO web interface. The description is supported on versions of MSO that are 3.3 or greater.
- `display_name` (String) The name as displayed on the MSO web interface.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `epg` (String) The name of the EPG to manage.
- `epg_type` (String) The EPG type parameter is supported on versions of MSO that are 3.3 or greater.
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `intersite_multicast_source` (Boolean) Whether intersite multicast source is enabled. When not specified, this parameter defaults to `no`.
- `intra_epg_isolation` (String) Whether intra EPG isolation is enforced. When not specified, this parameter defaults to `unenforced`.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `preferred_group` (Boolean) Whether this EPG is added to preferred group or not. When not specified, this parameter defaults to `no`.
- `proxy_arp` (Boolean) Whether proxy arp is enabled. When not specified, this parameter defaults to `no`.
- `qos_level` (String) Quality of Service (QoS) allows you to classify the network traffic in the fabric. It helps prioritize and police the traffic flow to help avoid congestion in the network. The Contract QoS Level parameter is supported on versions of MSO that are 3.1 or greater.
- `service_type` (String) The service_type parameter refers to the type of cloud services. Only certain deployment types, and certain access types within each deployment type, are supported for each service type. This parameter is available only when epg_type is service.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) Use `present` or `absent` for adding or removing. Use `query` for listing an object or multiple objects.
- `subnets` (String) The subnets associated to this ANP.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `useg_epg` (Boolean) Whether this is a USEG EPG.
- `vrf` (String) The VRF associated to this ANP.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
